query: SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.descricao, a.status, p.userId FROM actions a JOIN pdis p ON a.pdiId = p.id WHERE p.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%teste2%' OR name LIKE '%teste2%') ORDER BY a.id DESC;
